info.name: Oracle Fusion – Miscellaneous Receipt API
info.description:
Dedicated Postman collection for the Oracle Fusion AR **Miscellaneous Receipt** API endpoint.

## What is a Miscellaneous Receipt?
A miscellaneous (non-customer) receipt posts a cash collection directly to a Receivable Activity account rather than being applied to a customer invoice. In this integration it is used for:
- **Cash-rounding adjustments** – small rounding differences (negative `Amount.Value`)
- **Bank charges / non-invoice payments** – any misc charge that must hit a specific GL activity account

## How it is created (Java code flow)
```
VendHQSalesToFusionInvRecIntBackup / VendHQSalesToFusionInvRecIntParallel
  └─ FusionMiscReceiptMapping.mapToMiscReceipt(payment, invoice, receiptMethodMeta, outletDetail, …)
       sets: currencyCode, saleDate, receiptMethodId, receiptMethodName,
             receiptNumber = "{PaymentType}-{TransactionNumber}-MISC",
             bankAccountName  = registerDetails.getCashAccount() | getBankAccount(),
             receivableActivityName = "Cash Rounding" | custom activity,
             orgId = businessUnitId (per region)
  └─ FusionMiscReceiptTransform.mapMiscReceiptModel(request)
       maps to SOAP MiscellaneousReceipt object
  └─ FusionReceiptClient.saveMiscReceipt(miscReceiptRequest)
       calls SOAP MiscellaneousReceiptService.createMiscellaneousReceipt()
       WSDL: https://{host}.fa.{region}.oraclecloud.com/fscmService/MiscellaneousReceiptService?WSDL
  └─ SalesFusionPersistence.syncMiscReceipt(request, success, message)
       persists result to FUSION_MISC_RECEIPT table
```

## Included requests
| Order | Method | Endpoint | Purpose |
|-------|--------|----------|---------|
| 1 | POST | `/receivablesMiscellaneousReceipts` | Create a new miscellaneous receipt |
| 2 | GET  | `/receivablesMiscellaneousReceipts` | List / search miscellaneous receipts |
| 3 | GET  | `/receivablesMiscellaneousReceipts/{MiscReceiptId}` | Retrieve receipt by ID |

## Authentication
All requests use **HTTP Basic Authentication**. Set the following variables in the active environment:
- `fusion_username` – Oracle Fusion Cloud username
- `fusion_password` – Oracle Fusion Cloud password
- `fusion_base_url` – Full base URL (e.g. `https://ehxk-test.fa.em2.oraclecloud.com`)
- `misc_receipt_id` – Set this after running POST Create Miscellaneous Receipt

## How to import
1. In Postman click **Import** and select this file.
2. Import `Fusion_Environment.json` and activate that environment.
3. Fill in your Oracle Fusion credentials and instance URL.
4. Run the requests in the order shown above.

variable.description: Oracle Fusion Cloud base URL. Override in the active Postman environment.
MiscReceiptId returned by POST Create Miscellaneous Receipt. Update after running POST.

exec: // Automatically capture MiscReceiptId for use in subsequent GET requests

request.description:
Creates a miscellaneous (non-customer) receipt in Oracle Fusion AR.

**Mapped to:** `FusionReceiptClient.saveMiscReceipt()` → `MiscellaneousReceiptService.createMiscellaneousReceipt()`
**SOAP WSDL:** `https://{host}.fa.{region}.oraclecloud.com/fscmService/MiscellaneousReceiptService?WSDL`
**REST path:** `POST /fscmRestApi/resources/11.13.17.11/receivablesMiscellaneousReceipts`

### Java data flow
1. `FusionMiscReceiptMapping.mapToMiscReceipt()` builds the `MiscReceiptRequest` from VendHQ payment + invoice data
2. `FusionMiscReceiptTransform.mapMiscReceiptModel()` converts it to the SOAP `MiscellaneousReceipt` object
3. `FusionReceiptClient.saveMiscReceipt()` calls the SOAP service and returns `MiscReceiptResponse.successResponse`
4. `SalesFusionPersistence.syncMiscReceipt()` stores the result in the `FUSION_MISC_RECEIPT` DB table

### Conditions for receipt creation
- Receipt is **skipped** when `receiptAmount == 0`
- Receipt is **skipped** when `receiptAmount > 0` AND receivableActivityName is **not** `Cash Rounding`
- All other cases (negative amounts, or positive cash-rounding) are submitted

### Request fields
| Field | Java source | Type | Required | Example | Notes |
|-------|-------------|------|----------|---------|-------|
| CurrencyCode | `invoice.getInvoiceCurrencyCode()` | String | Yes | AED | ISO 4217 |
| ReceiptDate | `invoice.getSaleDate()` | String | Yes | 2024-03-14 | YYYY-MM-DD |
| GlDate | `invoice.getSaleDate()` | String | Yes | 2024-03-14 | Same as ReceiptDate |
| ReceiptMethodId | `receiptMethodMeta.getReceiptMethodId()` | Long | Yes | 300000001001002 | From FusionReceiptMethod |
| ReceiptMethodName | `payment.getPaymentType()` (or "Cash") | String | Yes | Cash Rounding | Non-cash uses paymentType as-is |
| ReceiptNumber | `{paymentType}-{transactionNumber}-MISC` | String | Yes | Cash-INV-10001-MISC | Unique per receipt |
| RemittanceBankAccountName | `registerDetails.getCashAccount()` or `getBankAccount()` | String | Yes | Main Cash Account | Cash account for rounding; bank account otherwise |
| ReceivableActivityName | `metaMappings[1]` (rounding) or `metaMappings[2]` | String | Yes | Cash Rounding | AR activity to post to |
| OrgId | `session.getFusionBusinessUnitIdMapfindByRegion(region)` | Long | Yes | 300000001001000 | Fusion BU per outlet region |
| Amount.Value | computed misc charge | Number | Yes | -0.50 | Negative = cash-rounding deduction |
| Amount.CurrencyCode | same as CurrencyCode | String | Yes | AED | Must match top-level CurrencyCode |

### Post-run test script
The pre-bundled test script automatically stores `misc_receipt_id` in the environment so the GET by ID request can use it immediately.

response.name: 400 Bad Request – Validation error
response.body:
{
  "type": "https://www.w3.org/Protocols/rfc2616/rfc2616-sec10.html#sec10.4.1",
  "title": "Bad Request",
  "detail": "ORA-20001: The value of CurrencyCode must not be null.",
  "o:errorPath": "CurrencyCode",
  "o:errorCode": "FUSION_REST_VALIDATION"
}

query.description:
Server-side filter expression. Supported examples:
  OrgId=300000001001000
  ReceiptNumber='Cash-INV-10001-MISC'
  ReceiptDate>='2024-01-01' and ReceiptDate<='2024-12-31'
  CurrencyCode='AED'
Comma-separated list of fields to return. Omit to return all fields.
Number of records per page (default 25, max 500).

request.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of Oracle Fusion AR miscellaneous receipts. Supports server-side filtering, field projection, and pagination.

**REST path:** `GET /fscmRestApi/resources/11.13.17.11/receivablesMiscellaneousReceipts`

### Filter examples
| Use case | q parameter |
|----------|-------------|
| By org unit | `OrgId=300000001001000` |
| By receipt number | `ReceiptNumber='Cash-INV-10001-MISC'` |
| By date range | `ReceiptDate>='2024-01-01' and ReceiptDate<='2024-12-31'` |
| By currency | `CurrencyCode='AED'` |

### Key response fields
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| MiscReceiptId | Long | Fusion internal receipt ID — use for GET by ID |
| ReceiptNumber | String | Format: {PaymentType}-{TxnNumber}-MISC |
| ReceiptDate | String | ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) |
| GlDate | String | GL posting date |
| CurrencyCode | String | ISO 4217 currency |
| Amount | Number | Receipt amount (negative for cash-rounding deductions) |
| Status | String | Confirmed / Remitted / Cleared |
| ReceiptMethodName | String | e.g. Cash Rounding |
| ReceivableActivityName | String | AR activity account used for posting |

response.name: 200 OK – List of miscellaneous receipts
200 OK – Empty list (no receipts match filter)

variable.description: MiscReceiptId returned by POST Create Miscellaneous Receipt (auto-populated by the POST test script).

request.description:
Retrieves a single miscellaneous receipt from Oracle Fusion AR by its internal `MiscReceiptId`.

**REST path:** `GET /fscmRestApi/resources/11.13.17.11/receivablesMiscellaneousReceipts/{MiscReceiptId}`

The `misc_receipt_id` variable is automatically populated in the collection-level variable and active environment by the POST Create Miscellaneous Receipt test script. Alternatively set it manually in the Postman environment.

### Path variable
| Variable | Example | Description |
|----------|---------|-------------|
| misc_receipt_id | 300000001500001 | `MiscReceiptId` from POST Create Miscellaneous Receipt response |

### Key response fields
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| MiscReceiptId | Long | Fusion internal receipt ID |
| ReceiptNumber | String | {PaymentType}-{TxnNumber}-MISC |
| ReceiptDate | String | Receipt date (YYYY-MM-DD) |
| GlDate | String | GL posting date (YYYY-MM-DD) |
| CurrencyCode | String | ISO 4217 currency code |
| Amount | Number | Negative for cash-rounding; positive for misc income |
| Status | String | Confirmed / Remitted / Cleared |
| OrgId | Long | Fusion business unit / org ID |
| ReceiptMethodId | Long | Oracle payment method ID |
| ReceiptMethodName | String | e.g. Cash, Credit Card, Cash Rounding |
| ReceivableActivityName | String | AR activity account for GL posting |
| RemittanceBankAccountName | String | Cash account (rounding) or bank account (other) |

response.name: 404 Not Found – Receipt does not exist
response.body:
{
  "type": "https://www.w3.org/Protocols/rfc2616/rfc2616-sec10.html#sec10.4.5",
  "title": "Not Found",
  "detail": "No MiscellaneousReceipt was found for MiscReceiptId: 999999999.",
  "o:errorPath": "MiscReceiptId",
  "o:errorCode": "FUSION_REST_NOTFOUND"
}
